pacing-ampelkarten.title: Pacing signal cards
pacing-ampelkarten.description: Create printable signal cards for better, cautious, and crash days - in German or English, for adults or in child mode.
pacing-ampelkarten.section.meta.title: Choose a mode
pacing-ampelkarten.section.meta.descript: Start by choosing whether you want to edit the cards for adults or in child mode. All texts stay fully editable afterwards.
pacing-ampelkarten.meta.variant.label: Variant
pacing-ampelkarten.meta.variant.help: The selected variant controls which card set is used in the export.
pacing-ampelkarten.section.adult.title: Adult cards
pacing-ampelkarten.section.adult.descrip: These three cards are written for adults with ME/CFS. Edit every text freely or leave individual lists empty.
pacing-ampelkarten.section.child.title: Child cards
pacing-ampelkarten.section.child.descrip: These cards use simpler wording and address relatives or carers directly.
pacing-ampelkarten.section.notes.title: Notes for page 2 (bottom half)
pacing-ampelkarten.section.notes.descrip: This block appears in the lower half of page 2. Use it for personal rules that do not fit on the signal cards.
pacing-ampelkarten.section.sender.title: Signature / closing line
pacing-ampelkarten.adult.cards.red.title: Red - very limited today
pacing-ampelkarten.child.cards.red.title: Red - rest day
pacing-ampelkarten.card.canDo.label: What is possible today
pacing-ampelkarten.card.canDo.help: Short bullet points for things that are still manageable today.
pacing-ampelkarten.card.needHelp.label: Where help matters most
pacing-ampelkarten.card.needHelp.help: What kind of support is especially helpful today.
pacing-ampelkarten.card.visitRules.label: Visit rules
pacing-ampelkarten.card.visitRules.help: Rules for visits, calls, or contact.
pacing-ampelkarten.card.stimuli.label: Stimuli / surroundings
pacing-ampelkarten.card.stimuli.help: Notes about noise, light, smells, or other triggers.
pacing-ampelkarten.card.hint.label: Friendly note
pacing-ampelkarten.card.hint.help: A short guiding sentence for the card.
pacing-ampelkarten.card.thanks.label: Thank-you line
pacing-ampelkarten.card.thanks.help: A short closing or thank-you sentence.
pacing-ampelkarten.notes.title.label: Title for the notes block
pacing-ampelkarten.notes.title.help: This title is shown above the personal rules on page 2.
pacing-ampelkarten.notes.items.label: Notes / personal rules
pacing-ampelkarten.notes.items.help: Short lines for personal rules, for example visiting times or hard limits.
pacing-ampelkarten.card.imageAlt.green: Sloth card with a calm green background
pacing-ampelkarten.card.imageAlt.yellow: Panda card with a careful yellow background
pacing-ampelkarten.card.imageAlt.red: Lion card with a quiet red background
pacing-ampelkarten.ui.intro.title: How to use these cards
pacing-ampelkarten.ui.intro.body:
## What this formpack creates
This template creates **three pacing signal cards** for green, yellow, and red days. Page 1 contains green + yellow, page 2 contains red + the notes block in the lower half.

## Edit and print
- You can edit every text.
- You can also leave fields empty and write on the print-out later.
- If something changes, simply print the cards again.

## Adult or child mode?
- **For adults**: more direct, factual wording.
- **Child mode**: friendlier wording, meant for children roughly aged 8 to 14 and the people around them.

## Print layout
- Exported as **A4** with **2 cards per page**.
- There is a **cutting line with scissors** between the upper and lower half.
- The **bottom half of page 2** is reserved for your notes or individual rules.

## Tip
If you laminate the cards, you can update individual points later with a wipe-clean pen.
pacing-ampelkarten.ui.intro.checkboxLabe: I understand how to edit, print, and cut the cards.
